entities.description: As a subsection of 'Other Design Considerations', this section discusses the design and configuration of the boot circuitry, which is critical for the proper initialization of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the circuitry and configuration process involved in initializing the system, as detailed in section 5.2.4.

relations.description: The concept of '启动配置电路' is the primary focus of section 5.2.4.
